title: Move Test Webhook form into unified panel; remove test-type select; make form collapsible
description: Move the Test Webhook form from the Maintenance group into the unified panel-categorization. Remove the test-type select element — the form will inherit scope from the panel's segmented control (DEC-0016). Wrap the form in a collapsible <details> element, collapsed by default. Preserve description and destination_name input fields.
notes: Form inherits scope from panel selector. When scope is 'Both', default to 'withdrawal' for single test. test-type select removal documented in user guide (AC-8).
